title: Live: Rocket Lab Q1 Earnings Tonight - Can RKLB Continue to Soar?
text: As Rocket Lab prepared to announce Q1 2026 earnings, investor optimism was high following a stellar 2025 and robust early 2026 performance. The company's stock had surged significantly year-to-date, driven by record contract wins and strong revenue growth. Analysts and investors were watching closely to see if Rocket Lab could continue its momentum with Q1 results. Key focus areas included revenue growth rate, margin expansion, backlog growth, and Neutron development progress. The earnings call proved bullish with record revenue, expanded margins, record backlog, and significant new contract wins announced, validating investor confidence in the company's execution.
